SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-22-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:30am
Judge Pro Tem Rick Wise, clerk-beth wilber, dept. 525:
Cause called for small claims appeal. Appellant, Klaus Zimmerman, appears through counsel, Frederick Roesti; Respondents, Jason Tsuchida & Vinson Villaroma, appear in Pro Per. Mr. Roesti presents Appellant's case; Appellant & Respondents are sworn. Appellants present their case in the narrative.
